footer.tagline: Parisian boxing club based in Ivry-sur-Seine. Real fighters, real training. Book your class online in seconds.

hero.subtext: Parisian boxing club. Real fighters, real training.

pricing_section.heading: Choose your discipline
pricing_section.subtext: Annual memberships, no hidden fees. Start whenever you want.

about_section.p1: Overhandz started as a single room, a few bags, and a coach who believed that real boxing isn't reserved for elite athletes.
about_section.p2: Today, over 1,600 members have trained with us — from absolute beginners to competitive fighters representing Paris on the regional circuit.
about_section.p3: We're based in Ivry-sur-Seine, just minutes from central Paris. Walk in as a beginner. Leave as a fighter.

final_cta.heading: Train with us.
final_cta.subtext: Show up and see what Overhandz is about.
final_cta.location: Ivry-sur-Seine · Paris · Open 5 days a week

pricing_page.heading: Pricing
pricing_page.subtext: Memberships tailored to your discipline and schedule.

faqs.a: Come directly to the gym or contact us to choose your plan. No long-term commitment required.
Yes. Come for a drop-in class (€15) to see if the discipline suits you before committing to an annual subscription.
Yes. The Boxe Anglaise Full subscription is available at a reduced rate for students and pupils. Ask at the front desk.

faqs.q: What does the Full membership include?
faqs.a: Full plans (Boxe Anglaise Full and Muay-Thaï Full) include open gym access outside of classes and a free T-shirt.
Gloves and wraps can be borrowed from the gym. We recommend getting your own equipment after a few sessions.
Private lessons are available by appointment with our coaches. Contact us for availability and pricing.

about_page.heading: About
about_page.philosophy_p1_rest: We believe foundations make fighters. Every session builds on proper stance, footwork, and defense before power.
about_page.philosophy_p2_rest: Beginners and fight team members train in the same space. That's intentional — it accelerates learning and builds community.
about_page.philosophy_p3_rest: We take the sport seriously. We don't take ourselves too seriously. The gym is demanding, not exclusive.

coaches.name: Coach Rudy
coaches.bio: Specialist in English boxing, Rudy leads Tuesday and Thursday classes. Rigorous technique, accessible teaching — whether you are a beginner or preparing for a fight.

coaches.name: Coach Fabrice
coaches.bio: Passionate about Muay Thai, Fabrice leads Monday classes. His approach combines striking technique, pad work, and physical conditioning for all levels.

coaches.name: Coach Morad
coaches.role: Muay Thai & Women's Muay Thai Coach
coaches.bio: Morad leads Muay Thai and women's classes on Wednesdays and Fridays. A demanding and supportive environment, with particular attention to technique and individual progress.

contact_page.heading: Contact
contact_page.name: Name
contact_page.success_subtext: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

metadata.about_desc: The story behind Overhandz Boxing Club in Ivry-sur-Seine, Paris. Meet the coaches and discover our training philosophy.
metadata.contact_desc: Get in touch with Overhandz Boxing Club in Ivry-sur-Seine, Paris. Send a message, WhatsApp us, or come visit us.
